testcase.name: testTransferFromSavingsAccountWithinMinimumBalance
testcase.system-out: TransactionController: Processing transfer from SAV005 to CHQ004, amount: 400.0 SavingsAccount: Transfer completed successfully Initializing database (internal)... All database tables verified/created. Admin user already exists; checking for sample data... Sample data already exists. Database initialized successfully! TransactionController: Transfer SUCCESS - Transaction: TXN_1775031895405

SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. testcase.name: testTransferBetweenAccounts
